title: Block of dates in the calendar
excerpt: Hello, I would like to know if monday can block dates in the calendar, that is, if I add a date for an event, and another user or the same user, they cannot use that date, since they are already busy. And if it can, how …

posts.author: JorgeGarcia (Jorge Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to know if monday can block dates in the calendar, that is, if I add a date for an event, and another user or the same user, they cannot use that date, since they are already busy. And if it can, how is it done?
